sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Move LEFT 5 times to trigger reset
result = action(['LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT'])
print(f"Result: {result}")
print(f"Level completed: {result.get('level_completed', False)}")

# Check for new blocks
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
from collections import Counter
color_counts = Counter(n['color'] for n in nodes if n['pixels'] > 3)
print(f"Multi-pixel colors: {dict(color_counts)}")

# Check for target blocks
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] in ['g', 'N', 'r', 'O'] and n['pixels'] > 3:
        rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
        cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
        print(f"  Target {n['color']}: pixels={n['pixels']}, bbox=[{min(rows)},{min(cols)}]-[{max(rows)},{max(cols)}]")

# Check player
player = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'b'][0]
print(f"Player: boundary={player['boundary']}")

# Check sky blue
sky_blue = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'S'][0]
print(f"Sky blue: pixels={sky_blue['pixels']}, bbox=[{min(p[0] for p in sky_blue['boundary'])},{min(p[1] for p in sky_blue['boundary'])}]-[{max(p[0] for p in sky_blue['boundary'])},{max(p[1] for p in sky_blue['boundary'])}]")

# Check progress
purple = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'p'][0]
print(f"Purple: {purple['pixels']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
